examples: He settled in the silt, both eyes on the somnambulant beasts-morbid curiosity.
Tsai enters the kitchen, humming a song, and get a cup of water from the water dispenser in a somnambulant state.
Jennifer Jason Leigh, in one of her more somnambulant moods, plays an interactive-game designer named Allegra, who is attacked while showing off her new creation, eXistenZ.
Croesus blames the somnambulant experts on Wall Street, who are supposed to know that GE is half a lending company and thus must be compromised by ruinous credit markets.
Headlines shriek that Washington has turned against Obama, that the press honey moon is over, and that the previously somnambulant White House press corps is actually asking tough questions.
